meta.title: Joule Dynamics | Automation That Pays For Itself
meta.description: RAG chatbots, price monitoring, and lead generation systems built for measurable ROI. Get your free automation audit.

devHub.tooltip: This is our active development hub, hosted on Vercel. Everything here is real, working code — not mockups. We ship fast here first; the branded production domain follows once the first client engagement is underway.

hero.headline: Automation That Pays For Itself
hero.subheadline: RAG systems, pricing intelligence, and lead pipelines — built by an engineer, not a template.

solutions.title: Never Get Undercut on Price Again
solutions.problemStatement: Retailers lose margin every day competitors quietly drop prices and nobody notices until sales dip.
solutions.solutionDescription: An always-on monitor that checks competitor pricing and stock levels around the clock and flags changes the moment they happen — no manual spreadsheet-checking required.

demo.altText: Pricing monitor dashboard showing real-time competitor price changes

solutions.ctaLabel: See how this applies to your catalog →

solutions.title: 100 Qualified Leads a Week, on Autopilot
solutions.problemStatement: Sales teams spend hours a week manually hunting for contacts instead of selling.
solutions.solutionDescription: A pipeline that finds decision-makers matching your ideal customer profile, pulls verified contact details, and hands your team a ready-to-use list — so outreach starts same-day instead of next week.

demo.altText: Lead generation pipeline output showing enriched prospect list

solutions.ctaLabel: Get a sample lead list for your niche →

solutions.title: Answers Your Customers Instantly, From Your Own Docs
solutions.problemStatement: Support teams re-answer the same FAQs all day, and customers wait hours for simple answers.
solutions.solutionDescription: A chat assistant trained on your FAQs, policies, or product docs that answers instantly and correctly, on WhatsApp or your website — and escalates to a human only when it actually needs to.

demo.altText: Live smart support chatbot demo widget
demo.fallbackNote: Ask a question below to try the live demo

howItWorks.title: 10-Minute Audit
howItWorks.description: We identify the highest-leverage automation opportunity in your workflow — no jargon, no obligation.

howItWorks.title: Pilot Build
howItWorks.description: A small, fixed-scope pilot proves the value before any large commitment.

howItWorks.title: Scale & Support
howItWorks.description: Once proven, we expand coverage and provide ongoing support so the system keeps delivering.

about.headline: Engineering rigor, applied to AI.
about.bio: I'm Jodinho — a First-Class Mechanical Engineering graduate who moved deliberately into AI engineering, now Azure AI-102 certified. I build the kind of systems most agencies talk about but few actually ship: production RAG pipelines, resilient scraping infrastructure, and automation that runs unattended. Joule Dynamics exists to bring that same engineering rigor to problems that are currently costing you time or money.

contact.headline: Let's find what's automatable in your business.

fields.name: problem
fields.label: What's costing you the most right now?

contact.trustLine: No sales pitch — just a 10-minute look at what's automatable in your workflow.

services.title: Agentic RAG
services.description: Reasoning-heavy architectures for zero-hallucination compliance engines.

services.title: Resilient Scraping Pipelines
services.description: Enterprise data pipelines handling high-density target extraction with automatic proxy-rotation, TLS fingerprint emulation, and explicit bypass of Datadome, Cloudflare, and PerimeterX enterprise-grade bot defenses.
services.roiVector: Extracts 10k–50k records/hr · 99.8% bypass rate on enterprise scraper defenses

services.title: AI Infrastructure
services.description: Autonomous agent workflows injected directly into existing enterprise stacks.
